repos.name: iv-cbv-payroll
repos.description: Eligibility Made Easy (Emmy) using Consent-Based Verification (CBV) is a prototype that allows benefit applicants to verify their income directly using payroll providers. It is currently being piloted for testing and validation purposes.

commits.author: Daphne Gold

commits.message:
No ticket: set up ai test classifier (#1802)

New github action that, on each PR, classifies failing tests as APPLICATION_BUG / TEST_BUG / FLAKY_FAILURE / ENVIRONMENT_ISSUE and posts a comment summary
commits.author: Tim Miller

commits.message: Remove body from exception message for HttpPdfTransmitter errors (#1807)
commits.author: Tom Dooner

commits.message: FFS-4425: Enable specific agencies to run in an iframe (#1794)
commits.author: Ben Calegari

commits.message:
Run the reviewer lottery only when no human reviewer is already requested (#1805)

Adding copilot as a reviewer meant that the review lottery action was skipped as it already detected a reviewer. Now it will run only when no human reviewer is already requested. A reviewer set at PR creation (e.g. by the auto-fix-vulnerabilities workflow) is type "User" and still preserved.
commits.author: Ben Calegari

commits.message: FFS-4311: Lowercase header title copy on validated employment review page (#1804)
commits.author: Ben Calegari

commits.message:
No ticket: add AI disclosure to PR template, delete top comment (#1792)

Added an AI disclosure to our PR template
Removed the top comment, which I just delete without reading every time anyway (open to debate)
commits.author: Tim Miller

commits.message:

commits.message: FFS-4433, FFS-4434: Fix Rick Banas education records not found when launched via the advanced launcher, Fix pre-populated activities not appearing on activity hub after advanced launcher selection (#1790)
commits.author: Daphne Gold

commits.message:
Update will-deploy script to output new link (#1766)

Updated app/bin/will-deploy to output "Open the launcher" instead of "Launch the demo", and changed the link URL from https://la-verify-demo.navapbc.cloud/demo to https://verify-demo.navapbc.cloud/launcher.
commits.author: Tim Miller

commits.message: FFS-4444: updated timeout page content for NH pilot (#1789)

releases.name: deploy/prod/2026-06-11-15-46-27
releases.body:
📝 *Emmy Income only user facing changes*
  • Allow fallback transmission of redacted income reports ([#1806](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1806)) - Tom Dooner
  • FFS-4383: Remove cbv_applicant cookie/clearout logic ([#1810](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1810)) - Daphne Gold
🏆 *Emmy CE only user facing changes*
  • FFS-4425: Enable specific agencies to run in an iframe ([#1794](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1794)) - Ben Calegari
  • FFS-4311: Lowercase header title copy on validated employment review page ([#1804](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1804)) - Ben Calegari
⚙️ *Other/Maintenance (Not user facing)*
  • [FFS-4399] get database migrations up and running as a github action for CMS ([#1774](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1774)) - iannorriswork
  • No ticket: set up ai test classifier ([#1802](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1802)) - Tim Miller
  • Remove body from exception message for HttpPdfTransmitter errors ([#1807](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1807)) - Tom Dooner
  • Run the reviewer lottery only when no human reviewer is already requested ([#1805](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1805)) - Ben Calegari
  • No ticket: add AI disclosure to PR template, delete top comment ([#1792](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1792)) - Tim Miller
  • Bump puma from 8.0.1 to 8.0.2 in /app in the bundler group across 1 directory ([#1795](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1795)) - dependabot[bot]
releases.author: daphnegold

releases.name: deploy/prod/2026-06-09-18-00-37
releases.body:
📝 *Emmy Income only user facing changes*
  • FFS-4444: updated timeout page content for NH pilot ([#1789](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1789)) - Tim Miller
🏆 *Emmy CE only user facing changes*
  • FFS-4433, FFS-4434: Fix Rick Banas education records not found when launched via the advanced launcher, Fix pre-populated activities not appearing on activity hub after advanced launcher selection ([#1790](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1790)) - Daphne Gold
  • FFS-4318: Extend skeleton implementation to Work Program activities via API ([#1772](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1772)) - Daphne Gold
  • FFS-4227: Order education and employment cards chronologically ([#1771](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1771)) - Ben Calegari
  • FFS-4321: Extend skeleton implementation to Education activities via API ([#1764](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1764)) - Daphne Gold
  • FFS-4074: Show street address line 2 and zipcode in address on activity review page ([#1760](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1760)) - Ben Calegari
⚙️ *Other/Maintenance (Not user facing)*
  • Update will-deploy script to output new link ([#1766](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1766)) - Tim Miller
  • Bump docker/setup-buildx-action from 3 to 4 ([#1782](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1782)) - dependabot[bot]
  • Bump vitest from 4.1.7 to 4.1.8 in /app ([#1787](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1787)) - dependabot[bot]
  • Bump debase-ruby_core_source from 4.0.0 to 4.0.1 in /app ([#1778](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1778)) - dependabot[bot]
  • Bump css_parser from 2.2.0 to 3.0.0 in /app ([#1775](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1775)) - dependabot[bot]
  • Bump rubocop from 1.86.1 to 1.87.0 in /app ([#1776](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1776)) - dependabot[bot]
  • Bump bootsnap from 1.24.5 to 1.24.6 in /app ([#1777](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1777)) - dependabot[bot]
  • Bump aws-sdk-s3 from 1.224.0 to 1.225.0 in /app ([#1779](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1779)) - dependabot[bot]
  • Bump webpack-cli from 7.0.2 to 7.0.3 in /app ([#1780](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1780)) - dependabot[bot]
  • Bump happy-dom from 20.9.0 to 20.10.1 in /app ([#1781](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1781)) - dependabot[bot]
  • Bump vite from 8.0.14 to 8.0.16 in /app ([#1785](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1785)) - dependabot[bot]
  • Bump aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials from 4 to 6 ([#1784](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1784)) - dependabot[bot]
  • Bump nanasess/setup-chromedriver from 2 to 3 ([#1786](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1786)) - dependabot[bot]
  • Add rake task for sending failed reports ([#1763](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1763)) - Tim Miller
  • FFS-4394: Tweak ECS deploy service_name ([#1773](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1773)) - iannorriswork
  • FFS-4393 implement ability to push to CMS repositories ([#1768](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1768)) - iannorriswork
  • [FFS-4394] introduce way to manually deploy to ecs depending on terraform that doesnt exist in this repo ([#1769](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1769)) - iannorriswork
  • Fix time related spec failures ([#1770](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1770)) - Ben Calegari
